name: excel-mcp-pro
description: MCP server for cross-file Excel work — multi-workbook ops, VBA authoring, CSV consolidation, and project-context-aware automation that the in-Excel Claude add-in cannot do. 110 tools, cross-platform.

scripts.pack:mcpb: npm run build && npm run manifest:generate && npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack .
scripts.test: node --test test/manifest-sync.test.mjs test/sandbox.test.mjs test/smoke.test.mjs test/v31.test.mjs test/sparklines.test.mjs test/audit.test.mjs test/modern-charts.test.mjs test/live-inspections.test.mjs test/tier-a.test.mjs test/tier-b.test.mjs test/tier-c.test.mjs test/tier-d.test.mjs

contributors.name: sbraind
contributors.comment: Original author of the upstream Excel MCP Server (v1.x/v2.x foundation)
